想問下點睇PPP

To: cb@cityu.edu.hk

Subject :Consideration for the organization of courses in Summer Semester

Dear Sir/Madam,
You may be aware that the economy of Hong Kong has seriously been affected by both the social movement starting from June last year together with the outbreak of Covid 19 which is still a major concern for the territory's citizens. The end result of these unforeseeable events not only weaken investors' confidence, it also creates negative effect on the economy and we witness immediate loss of employment opportunities in most sectors of the territory. It is expected that there will be a further increase in the number of unemployment, not to mention the remote possibility of creating extra job opportunities for interns during the summer time.  I think you will concur with me that it will be extremely difficult for us to find summer jobs at this point of time. Another point that I would like to draw your attention is that most of the summer exchanges programmes have been canceled due to the coronavirus disease.

It is simply a waste of time for us to remain passive and doing nothing at all. In order to allow CB students to be occupied during this summer and accelerate their learning process, may I take this opportunity to suggest all programme and course leaders to consider organizing College Core and College Elective courses for their participation during the Summer Semester of 2020. I fully understand that college staffs and lecturers are required to take a break after a year's of commitment and service, given the various misfortune for all of us in the mid-2019 and 2020, it is a time for us to join hand in hand to do something meaningful and valuable.  



Best,

2019/20 下學期順利完成

 
因應疫情發展，大學率先於2月7日實施CityU-Learning，按原定時間表、全校性、實時、為研究生及本科生網上授課。據了解，城大是香港的八大中，甚至是世界上首間因應疫情而率先推行網上教學的大學。
 
根據我們於2月及3月進行先導及全校性問卷調查結果顯示，網上教學行之有效。
 
在3 月 30 日至 5 月 10 日進行的2019/20下學期期末全校性教與學問卷，共收到39,451份問卷，其中第10條 「整體而言，我認為老師提供了有價值的學習體驗。」的總平均分為5.76（7分為非常認同、1分為非常不認同）。教與學問卷結果今日已發放予相關人員。
 
調查結果反映全校師生的共同努力和積極進取。 我們衷心感謝各學術和行政部門的教職員及學生的合作和大力支持。
 
任廣禹
學務副校長
2020年6月9日

咁都要打返個飛機先

因應疫情發展，大學率先於2月7日實施CityU-Learning，按原定時間表、全校性、實時、為研究生及本科生網上授課。據了解，城大是香港的八大中，甚至是世界上首間因應疫情而率先推行網上教學的大學。
 
根據我們於2月及3月進行先導及全校性問卷調查結果顯示，網上教學行之有效。
 
在3 月 30 日至 5 月 10 日進行的2019/20下學期期末全校性教與學問卷，共收到39,451份問卷，其中第10條 「整體而言，我認為老師提供了有價值的學習體驗。」的總平均分為5.76（7分為非常認同、1分為非常不認同）。教與學問卷結果今日已發放予相關人員。
 
調查結果反映全校師生的共同努力和積極進取。 我們衷心感謝各學術和行政部門的教職員及學生的合作和大力支持。
 
任廣禹
學務副校長
2020年6月9日
